response.original_title: Uphold® USA Customer Service™ Phone Email Address{Ask for help}
response.overview: To contact the Uphold Support Center ️ ☎️+1-[850].600.1393, you need to go through their official support channels.  ☎️+1-[850].600.1393 If your account is compromised, use the app immediately to freeze your account before submitting a ticket.
